description: A designed graphic showing a man in a dark suit and purple tie wearing a red 'MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN' cap, raising his hand in a salute. Across the middle in serif type is 'America FIRST'. A white inset box shows a U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services header and a headline 'USCIS Increases Screening, Vetting of Aliens Working in U.S.' with part highlighted in yellow. A White House wordmark is at the bottom.
notable_text: MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN; America FIRST; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services; USCIS Increases Screening, Vetting of Aliens Working in U.S.; The WHITE HOUSE
